body:
If you haven’t already, check out our [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/Expensify/ReactNativeChat/blob/main/contributingGuides/CONTRIBUTING.md) for onboarding and email contributors@expensify.com to request to join our Slack channel! ___ **Version Number:** v9.3.59-3 **Reproducible in staging?:** Yes **Reproducible in production?:** Yes **If this was caught during regression testing, add the test name, ID and link from BrowserStack:** https://github.com/Expensify/App/pull/86619 **Email or phone of affected tester (no customers):** leungbratt6+p2p@gmail.com **Issue reported by:** Applause Internal Team **Bug source:** Pull Request QA execution **Device used:** Windows 11/Chrome **App Component:** Money Requests ## Action Performed: Prerequisites: Two accounts: Test User A (you) and Test User B (recipient) Test User A has an Expensify Wallet set up (for "Pay with wallet" tests) Send Money - From Global Create: Scenario 3. Mark as paid from the global + button 1. Go to the Inbox tab (not inside any specific chat) 2. Tap the global + button 3. Start a send money flow and select Test User B as the recipient 4. Enter an amount and tap Next 5. On the confirmation page, tap Mark as paid Scenario 4. Pay with Wallet from the global + button 1. Go to the Inbox tab 2. Tap the global + button 3. Start a send money flow, select Test User B 4. Enter an amount and tap Next 5. On the confirmation page, tap Pay with wallet ## Expected Result: Step 5. On the confirmation page, tap Mark as paid or Pay with wallet ## Actual Result: Missing the Mark as paid or Pay with Wallet option on the confirm page ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: - [x] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [x] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [x] Windows: Chrome - [ ] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/2a0c1432-226a-412b-86cf-413b3378f36c [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)

If you haven’t already, check out our [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/Expensify/ReactNativeChat/blob/main/contributingGuides/CONTRIBUTING.md) for onboarding and email contributors@expensify.com to request to join our Slack channel! ___ **Version Number:** v9.3.59-0 **Reproducible in staging?:** Yes **Reproducible in production?:** Yes **If this was caught during regression testing, add the test name, ID and link from BrowserStack:** https://github.com/Expensify/App/pull/87394 **Email or phone of affected tester (no customers):** testpayment935@gmail.com **Issue reported by:** Applause Internal Team **Bug source:** Exploratory - Significant User Experience Deterioration **Device used:** Windows 11 pro /Chrome **App Component:** Chat Report View ## Action Performed: 1. Navigate to staging.new.expensify.com 2. Open any chat → click emoji picker button → pick an emoji 3. Resize the browser and 4. Click the emoji picker 5. Maximize the page while the emoji open 6. Notice the the emoji list is in the top 7. Click the compose box to write something ## Expected Result: In step 6, The emoji picker should remain in place In step 7, The compose box should focus when clicking ## Actual Result: In step 6, The emoji picker is at the top of the window In step 7, unable to focus the compose box unless we click + icon ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: - [ ] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [ ] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [x] Windows: Chrome - [ ] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/e43683ca-6e72-41d1-9ead-b78dda9cfffc [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)

If you haven’t already, check out our [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/Expensify/ReactNativeChat/blob/main/contributingGuides/CONTRIBUTING.md) for onboarding and email contributors@expensify.com to request to join our Slack channel! ___ **Version Number:** 9.3.58-7 **Reproducible in staging?:** Y **Reproducible in production?:** Y **If this was caught during regression testing, add the test name, ID and link from BrowserStack:** **Email or phone of affected tester (no customers):** **Logs:** https://stackoverflow.com/c/expensify/questions/4856 **Expensify/Expensify Issue URL:** **Issue reported by:** @joekaufmanexpensify **Slack conversation** (hyperlinked to channel name): [#Expensify Bugs](https://expensify.slack.com/archives/C049HHMV9SM/p1776085493693459) ## Action Performed: 1. Create a report and add several non-reimbursable expenses to it. 2. Submit and approve the report. 3. Note the pay button appears on the report, but we don't add the report to the pay queue on reports > to-do > pay. 4. Go to Inbox. ## Expected Result: We don't show the pinned pay action in the LHN for reports with only non-reimbursable expenses. Paying these reports is optional, and many customers won't do it. Pinning them will clog the LHN for these customers with actions that will never be resolved, making it less usable. ## Actual Result: We show the pinned pay action in the LHN for reports with only non-reimbursable reports. ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: Select the officially supported platforms where the issue was reproduced: - [ ] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [ ] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [x] Windows: Chrome - [x] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/ea530148-14fc-4b3a-a3c6-f9f286cac921 https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/ed02877e-1f87-4a3f-af99-cc0069702de0 [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)
